- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	React Vite app with TypeScript

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created React Vite project with TypeScript template using `npm create vite`

- [x] Customize the Project
	No customization needed for Hello World setup

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions required

- [x] Compile the Project
	Project builds successfully with `npm run build`

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Created Vite dev server task in VS Code

- [x] Launch the Project
	Ready to launch with `npm run dev`

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md created with project information and setup instructions
